summary: Iter 7 backend testing complete. All 24 new tests for Buyer Funnel (Niches/Blueprints + multi-dim Reviews + Buyer Profile) pass. Full regression of prior iter1-6 suites (97 tests) also pass — 121/121 green overall.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1178 lines — close to the 700-line guideline ceiling. Consider splitting into routers (auth/agents/rfqs/quotes/messages/admin/buyer-funnel) before next iteration.

PUT /api/users/me/profile has no role check — currently any authenticated user (buyer/agent/admin) can write niche_preference/business_model on their own user doc. Acceptable since fields are namespaced for buyers, but consider gating with require_role("buyer") or document the design choice.
create_review recomputes avg with len(reviews) without guarding against zero — safe today since insert happens first, but add a min(1, len(...)) defensive guard in case the insert fails silently.

blueprint_for() falls back to DEFAULT_BLUEPRINT for any unknown sub_category but does not signal it is a fallback. Consider returning a boolean flag like `is_default: true` so the UI can render an 'estimate' banner.
blueprints.py `last_verified` is a hardcoded string (2026-04-30). Should be data-driven per-blueprint or computed from a constant so it stays maintainable.
test_credentials: Seeded fresh buyer + agent users in MongoDB; sessions cleaned up in fixture teardown. Admin email admin@sourcehq.test reused.
seed_data_creation: Per-test-module: 1 buyer user/session, 1 agent user/session + agent_profile. All TEST_-prefixed; auto-cleaned in fixture teardown. No persistent data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 7 (Buyer Funnel) is fully validated. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter7_buyer_funnel.py covers GET /api/niches, GET /api/niches/{key} (200/404), GET /api/blueprints/{niche}/{sub} (curated + DEFAULT fallback + invalid niche 404), PUT /api/users/me/profile (auth + 401), POST /api/agents/{id}/reviews (multi-dim + legacy), GET /api/agents/{id} now exposes new dim fields. Total backend test count is now 121 (59 main + 38 iter6 + 24 iter7) — all pass. Run all three files together for full regression.
